classes.label: Form-factor-free exclusive modes
classes.notes: CKM slot squares + OZI/curvature pool + open-flavour contact registry; 0-row transparent export and 17-row diagnostic panel.

classes.label: Charmed/bottom baryon competition
classes.notes: Semileptonic/hadronic contacts (84/11, 42/5, 7/2) and spine reconciliation on Lambda_c and B+ benchmark edges.

classes.label: Excited spectroscopy mass panel
classes.notes: Heavy/molecular/orbital routing; direct readouts for charm/bottom ground and selected exotics.

classes.label: Production hierarchy / collider dressing
classes.notes: Open-charm/open-bottom weights 1/10 and 1/20, cascade factor 2, Upsilon to J/psi neutral cascade, collider vacuum limit; theorem bundle productionHierarchyDischarged.

classes.label: Inclusive/exclusive CKM ledger
classes.notes: Row/column-normalized slot ledger, CP skew 3/80, inclusive B NLO 21/20, finite-channel completion; theorem bundle ckmInclusiveExclusiveDischarged.

classes.label: LFU ratios $R_{D^{(*)}}$, $R_{K^{(*)}}$
classes.notes: Universal lepton weak contact 1/10; tau/mu mass ratio 76/175 from lock-in resonance step 175/76; open-bottom tau/mu suppression 21/50 from double monogamy on the competing c leg; vector daughter factor $(m_D/m_{D^*})^2 \times 21/25$.

classes.label: Angular observables (e.g.\ $P_5'$)
classes.notes: Differential $b \to s\ell\ell$ registry; low-$q^2$ $P_5'$ readout cpOddFanoHolonomySkew × 2 × spectatorHalfMonogamyContact = 9/100.

classes.label: Rare FCNC modes
classes.notes: Three-mode FCNC operator registry on the weak ledger: Bsll 3/1600, BsGamma 1/200, BsMuMu 21/160000.
